title: GlossModelOrigin
description:
GlossModelOrigin

Model Origin

A model has a fixed reference point by which we describe its location in an image.  This point is referred to as the model origin.  The model origin can be set to always be positioned at the center of the Model Window

automatically by setting the ModelOrgAutoCenter property to "1 - True" for that specific object.  The model origin can also be set manually by using the mouse to position the model origin or by setting the ModelOrgX and ModelOrgY properties.

It should be noted that the model origin coordinate position is with reference to the upper left position of the Model Window. The upper left position of the Model Window starts at [0,0].
